'''Perris''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] and the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] flight coordinator for the [[Peregrine (Dreadnaught-class)|''Peregrine'']] during the [[Caamas Document Crisis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
